content: Multi-tenant pitfalls: missing WHERE tenant_id (one miss = leak), RLS silent failures — connection pool contamination (missing RESET ALL/DISCARD ALL), shared cache poisoning (keys not tenant-prefixed), admin paths bypassing RLS, CVE-2024-10976 (Postgres RLS + pooling edge case). Enforce tenant scoping at one layer (RLS or repository) plus automated cross-tenant tests. Stripe pitfalls: not verifying webhook signatures, no idempotency (duplicate events double-provision), event ordering not guaranteed, heavy work inside handler (needs 200 within ~20s — queue instead), entitlements gated on a field that webhooks don't update, silent involuntary churn from failed payments (5-10% MRR) without dunning, and mapping each subscription status (trialing/active/past_due/unpaid/canceled) to explicit app behavior.
